name: Shit Poster
description: Specializes in creating attention-grabbing and provocative visual content. Use it for social media posts, memes, and viral content.
author: Artemis

input.prompt: Create an attention-grabbing shitpost style image with bold colors

inputs.name: content
inputs.description: The main content of the post

outputs.name: postFile
outputs.description: Path to the generated social media post file
